标题: Personal shopper level (⚠️Official website synchronization✈️Box packaging) MM6 x SALOMON - Spectur Maison Margiela's collaboration with SALOMON for the Spring/Summer 2025 collection features shoes based on the road running shoe Spectur 2. The upper is made of large mesh material combined with color-matching overlays and cut pieces. Both brands' logos are on the sides of the shoes, with materials including polyester fiber, polyurethane, and rubber. They are equipped with a full-length carbon fiber plate Energy Blade and Energy Foam cushioning system, with a thickened and widened heel for propulsion, cushioning, rebound, and stability. Sizes available: Women 35-40, Men 39-44.

MM6 Maison Margiela & Salomon collaboration model 24/couple casual sports thick-soled hiking derby shoes, featuring two innovative color combinations. Designed with Salomon's 3D Eending patented technology outsole for mountain sports, enhancing lateral stability and structure. Celebrities, influencers, and beautiful women are all falling for it. Tailored as a height-increasing tool for Chinese women. 🔥 
✔️Material: Original suede cowhide. 
✔️Lining: Nylon breathable mesh. 
✔️Outsole: Original mold steel-stamped TR outsole, super light and textured. 
✔️Size: Women's 35-39, Men's 40-44. (Custom-made for Women's 40, Men's 45, non-returnable or exchangeable)

Purchase-grade SALOMON AERO GLIDE 3 GRVL, 3rd generation. Features a tighter knit GRVL upper with water-repellent coating, good breathability, wide toe box and midfoot for various foot shapes. High elastic half inner boot tongue, sand-proof design, flat textured laces, hard insole with reflective elements, 4mm ORTHOIiTE molded footbed, white foam outsole for comfort and grip, V-shaped lugs for better traction. Available in women's sizes 35-41 and men's sizes 39-45.
